description: Hip-hop to move fast on the line. Nas, Wu-Tang, prep-shift fuel.
name: Service line — prep energy

description: Soul and Motown for a slow day off in the kitchen. Sam Cooke, Otis, Marvin.
name: Sunday cooking

description: Led Zeppelin and the Stones, loud, for a busy Friday service.
name: Kitchen rock

description: Wind-down after close. Bill Withers, Curtis Mayfield, Nina-soft.
name: Late night decompress

description: Whatever the mood is on a rare Monday off.
name: Days off

description: Steady soul to set up stations before doors. Aretha, Stevie.
name: Mise en place mornings

description: Loud and relentless for a Saturday double. Stones, Zeppelin, CCR.
name: Saturday double

description: Lighter Motown for a Sunday brunch rush. Marvin, Stevie, Sam Cooke.
name: Brunch service

description: 3am, lights off, plating tomorrow's specials in my head. The National, Bon Iver, Phoebe.
name: Can't sleep — indie

description: First coffee of the day, no rush. Bill Withers, Nina, Khruangbin.
name: Pour-over Sunday

description: Headphones on, building the business plan. Tribe, Nas, low and focused.
name: Rootstock planning

description: Last hour, breaking down the line. Curtis Mayfield, Otis.
name: Close and clean down

description: Big prep day, butchery and stock. Wu-Tang, Biggie, head down.
name: Prep grind

description: Sunday at Mom's. Stevie, Marvin, stuff everyone knows.
name: Family dinner — Bayonne

description: Long walk back up the hill after close. Nina, The National.
name: Walk home, Summit Ave
